subject: (no subject)
body:
please tell j.p.  that the proportions of the alhambra
are very severe.... the nazareth proportion. only
works well if kept.... it is the wrong model....   the
living spaces as opposed to the cerromonial spaces ,
are very tiny.... small windows... no fourniture, no
glass.. if we do colums they must have be for support
as the hurrucane codes are crazy.... therefore steel
inside... not very nice.. also not very thin...
